title: amaryllis × variegata
intro: Amaryllis × variegata, also known as the variegated amaryllis, is a hybrid of the amaryllis plant, characterized by its distinctive striped or mottled leaves. It has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and fever. The health benefits of Amaryllis × variegata include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant's bulbs and leaves are often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
